summary: W1464 refines the W1463 W987 construction by replacing the single chosen unit mapping-cone isomorphism input with explicit hom, inv, hom-inv, and inv-hom fields. It constructs the unit mapping-cone Iso from those four fields, feeds the constructed Iso into the W1463 input, and reassembles W949, W950, W730, W986, and W987 while preserving the unit mapping-cone model, localized-unit data, boundary relation, and target/endpoint projections. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported original four-task completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1464 constructs W987 from raw boundary fields, raw relation fields, W944 target no-univ data, W973 closed-embedding closedness data, normalized fixed-target fields, source-triangulation fields, endpoint kernel/cokernel-top fields, localized right adjoint data, localized adjunction unit and counit data, localized adjunction triangle identities, unit mapping-cone kernel/cokernel-top fields, and unit mapping-cone iso hom/inv/identity fields rather than proving those inputs from a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1464 raw W716/W717 fields, W944, W973, normalized-lift-blueprint, fixed-target uniqueness, source-pretriangulated, source-triangulated, triangle-completion, endpoint closed-embedding, endpoint open-map, endpoint cokernel-top, endpoint kernel-equality, localized right adjoint, localized adjunction unit, localized adjunction counit, localized adjunction triangle identities, unit-mapping-cone model, unit-mapping-cone closed-embedding, unit-mapping-cone open-map, unit-mapping-cone cokernel-top, unit-mapping-cone kernel-equality, unit-mapping-cone iso hom, unit-mapping-cone iso inv, unit-mapping-cone iso hom-inv, and unit-mapping-cone iso inv-hom inputs with real Lean constructions satisfying the positive-witness supplement, or replace them with an explicit positive witness.
Before any future product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
